10.response: {"Q0":"Everything was clear and also the game was a bit fun too."}

5.response: {"Q0":"Yes because at first it was giving green gems on every planet and I would get more gold even if I had to dig on the Blue planet that the astronaut had left."}

11.response: {"Q0":"I think it examines the reaction time and also the decisions based on percentage/risk/reward factor."}

13.response: {"Q0":"Thanks for giving me the opportunity to be part of this study and I hope my data can help, Best Regards"}

0.response: {"Q0":"The only strategy I used was not to waste any gold when unnecessary, only used gold if I knew I could get more gems almost certainly. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"No because it was worth it in the end wasting 3 gold to dig but could get 20 gold if the gem was red although the rock could appear instead it was worth it."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Yes I was more focused on selecting galaxies because of the 1 second limit."}

8.response: {"Q0":"The percentage and the value of the money."}
